generate.heading: Generate with AI
generate.intro: Paste source text and let AI create flashcard proposals for {{name}}.
generate.sourcePlaceholder: Paste up to ~1000 words of educational text...
generate.toastGenerating: Generation may take a few seconds
generate.noProposalsInline: No flashcards were generated. Try a longer or clearer text.
generate.removedBanner: {{count}} proposal(s) skipped — already exist in this set: {{fronts}}
generate.error.timeout: AI generation timed out. Please try again with a shorter text.
generate.error.apiError: AI service temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
generate.error.unconfigured: AI generation is not configured. Contact support.
generate.error.parseError: AI returned an unexpected response. Try a different text.
generate.error.noProposals: No flashcards could be generated. Try a longer or clearer text.
generate.error.rateLimit: Too many AI requests. Please wait an hour before trying again.
generate.check.title: Check a word
generate.check.description: Paste a word or phrase to look it up in the dictionary. Your source text and proposals will be kept.
